title: rubus × barrancoennensis
intro: Rubus × barrancoennensis is a hybrid species of raspberry, resulting from the cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus loganobaccus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of ellagic acid, which has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × barrancoennensis include its potential to reduce cancer risk, improve cardiovascular health, and provide anti-aging properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and reduce inflammation.
